programme.title: Destruction Decoded: Season 2
programme.desc: The creators of the program present shocking recordings that show man's clash with the power of the elements.The authors are looking for an answer to the question whether science will allow us to better prepare for disasters.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the Tarom Flight 371 accident, which occurred on March 31, 1995.Just after taking off from Bucharest airport, the plane began to tilt dangerously to the left.The machine fell in a field near the town of Balotesti.All people on board died - 50 passengers and 10 crew members.It was the worst air disaster in the country's history.There was speculation in the media about a bomb explosion.So the investigators asked FBI agents for help.Records from the black boxes helped determine the truth.It turned out that the captain did not notify about a serious engine failure.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue: Season 10
programme.desc: Further struggles for roadside assistance workers.During the harsh Norwegian winter, they help drivers in need.They also struggle with unfavorable conditions on communication routes.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue: Season 10
programme.desc: Further struggles for roadside assistance workers.During the harsh Norwegian winter, they help drivers in need.They also struggle with unfavorable conditions on communication routes.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Reconstruction of the biggest aviation accidents.Documentary filmmakers show situations preceding tragedies.The program will also include comments from specialists and testimonies of disaster witnesses.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Reconstruction of the biggest aviation accidents.Documentary filmmakers show situations preceding tragedies.The program will also include comments from specialists and testimonies of disaster witnesses.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Reconstruction of the biggest aviation accidents.Documentary filmmakers show situations preceding tragedies.The program will also include comments from specialists and testimonies of disaster witnesses.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Reconstruction of the biggest aviation accidents.Documentary filmmakers show situations preceding tragedies.The program will also include comments from specialists and testimonies of disaster witnesses.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Reconstruction of the biggest aviation accidents.Documentary filmmakers show situations preceding tragedies.The program will also include comments from specialists and testimonies of disaster witnesses.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Reconstruction of the biggest aviation accidents.Documentary filmmakers show situations preceding tragedies.The program will also include comments from specialists and testimonies of disaster witnesses.

programme.title: Engineering Europe: Compilations Season 1
programme.sub-title: The wonders of ecologically sustainable engineering

programme.title: World War II: History On Trial
programme.desc: Between 1945 and 1949, 12 trials against the Nazis were held in Nuremberg.For the first time, an international tribunal tried to settle war crimes.Prosecutors faced a challenge.

programme.title: World War II: History On Trial
programme.desc: Between 1945 and 1949, 12 trials against the Nazis were held in Nuremberg.For the first time, an international tribunal tried to settle war crimes.Prosecutors faced a challenge.

programme.title: How to Lose a War
programme.desc: The situation in 1941 indicated that the Axis powers would win the war.The conflict began with a series of brilliant victories for the Germans, Italians and Japanese.Hitler managed to conquer almost all of Europe.

programme.title: Airport Security 3: Peru
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the operation of the airport in Lima.It is one of the most important transfer hubs in Latin America.Anti-drug agents struggle with, among others:with smugglers smuggling cocaine.

programme.title: Airport Security 3: Peru
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the operation of the airport in Lima.It is one of the most important transfer hubs in Latin America.Anti-drug agents struggle with, among others:with smugglers smuggling cocaine.

programme.title: Car SOS
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend take on new classics to restore their glory.Renovations are carried out secretly from the owners.The team will have to deal with rust and broken engines.

programme.title: Massive Engineering Mistakes
programme.desc: Every year, the world is filled with news about yet another failed or unsafe construction project.The series presents current and historical mishaps of engineers from around the world.

programme.title: Massive Engineering Mistakes
programme.desc: Every year, the world is filled with news about yet another failed or unsafe construction project.The series presents current and historical mishaps of engineers from around the world.

programme.title: Mutant Weather
programme.desc: The program presents new weather phenomena caused by climate warming.They cause surprising changes in the world around us, to which we cannot adapt so quickly.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering: Season 13
programme.desc: There are many engineering projects in the world that have been abandoned for various reasons.The creators of the program present the stories of these structures and the people who created them.Behind each of them there is a fascinating and unique story.Viewers will discover the most spectacular examples of abandoned buildings from around the globe, including an underground Nazi base in France, designed to attack London, and a secret Japanese facility.We will find out why they were created and what led to their fall.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible: Secrets of Faith
programme.sub-title: Deconstruction of the Dead Sea Scrolls

programme.title: Forbidden History 4
programme.desc: The series is devoted to the extraordinary mysteries of history.Each episode will feature stories about treasures, conspiracy theories, ancient remains, lost civilizations and secrets of wars.

programme.title: Forbidden History 4
programme.desc: The series is devoted to the extraordinary mysteries of history.Each episode will feature stories about treasures, conspiracy theories, ancient remains, lost civilizations and secrets of wars.

programme.title: World War II: Secrets from Above
programme.desc: Aerial photos will show key places during World War II from a sky-high perspective.The authors of the series analyze the skirmishes between Hood and Bismarck, street fighting in Stalingrad and the defense of Berlin.

programme.title: Mega Building Collection
programme.desc: More impressive buildings will be presented, which attract attention with their scale and represent engineering achievements.
